zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Kyme於大約1281年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme38歲，母親Joan le Bigod35歲。她於1303年9月20日之前與Robert Umfraville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Kyme于大约1281年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme38岁，母亲Joan le Bigod35岁。她于1303年9月20日之前与Robert Umfraville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Kyme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North or South Kyme (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Kyme was born about 1281, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme, was 38 and her mother, Joan le Bigod, was 35. She married Robert Umfraville before 20 September 1303. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1318, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Kyme est née environ 1281, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan le Bigod, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Umfraville avant 20 septembre 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1318, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Kyme um 1281 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme 38 und ihre Mutter Joan le Bigod 35. Sie hat vor 20. September 1303 Robert Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1318 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Kyme è nata il circa 1281 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Joan le Bigod, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Robert Umfraville prima del 20 settembre 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1318, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Kymeが約1281年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kymeは38歳，母Joan le Bigodは35歳であった。1303年9月20日以前にRobert Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Kyme(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan le Bigod(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1303년 9월 20일 이전 Robert Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Kyme nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan le Bigod, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Umfraville antes 20 de setembro de 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1318, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Kyme родилась около 1281 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan le Bigod, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Umfraville перед 20 сентябрь 1303 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1318 г. в местности Англия.

sm.about 1281–before 1318: e tusa o le 1281–a'e le'I oo le 1318

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Kyme nació aproximadamente 1281, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan le Bigod, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Robert Umfraville antes de 20 de septiembre de 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1318, en Inglaterra.
